title: Session open on feat/eef_exploration — bootstrap fast-path, no other agents present

Multiple landing targets queued across threads (eef Promotion Packet pending owner approve/amend/reject; agentic-engineering-enhancements has two owner-authorised promotions held for fresh-session work; observability-sentry-otel has the local-dev Sentry boundary regression plan stub).
